transcript.text: Namaste! Dr. Sharma's clinic mein aap

Namaste! Dr. Sharma's clinic mein aapka swagat hai.
Would you like to continue in Hindi or English? — Kya aap Hindi mein baat karna chahenge ya English mein?
Welcome to Dr. Sharma's clinic. I'm the receptionist, and I'll be happy to assist you today. Can you please state your full name, sir?
Noted, thank you, Rohan. Can you please provide your contact phone number so I can update your record?
Noted, thank you, Rohan. Are you a new patient or have you visited Dr. Sharma's clinic before?
Noted, thank you, Rohan. What is the reason for your visit today, sir? This will help me to better assist you in scheduling an appointment.
I'm a bit unclear, could you please clarify what you mean by having a "summer cake"? Are you experiencing symptoms such as food poisoning or discomfort after consuming a particular food or dessert?
Yes, I'm experiencing food poisoning and vomiting.

This sounds like a medical emergency, Rohan. Please call 112 immediately or go to the nearest emergency room. I will also inform Dr. Sharma, and she will attend to you as soon as possible. Is there someone who can accompany you to the emergency room?
Noted, thank you, Rohan. I will stay in touch with the emergency room and let them know that you are on your way. Please try to stay calm and get the medical attention you need as soon as possible.
You're welcome, Rohan. This is the end of our conversation for now. We'll be in touch with the outcome of your visit to the emergency room. Please take care and feel better soon.

summary.summary: The caller, Rohan, contacted Dr. Sharma's clinic as a new patient experiencing symptoms of food poisoning after consuming a summer cake. The receptionist collected his contact information and assessed the situation as a medical emergency. The caller was advised to seek immediate medical attention at the nearest emergency room.
